result:
**Goal: Add a Fluid Dynamics simulation mode (Lattice Boltzmann method) with Shift+D toggle.**

This is the natural next frontier for the sandbox. The project has grid-based CAs, particle systems, reaction-diffusion, and agent-based models — but no **continuous fluid simulation**. A simplified Lattice Boltzmann fluid would be visually distinct from everything else: users could place obstacles and watch vortex streets, eddies, and laminar-to-turbulent flow emerge in real time. It fills the biggest remaining gap in simulation diversity and would be the most visually striking mode yet, rendering velocity/density fields with color gradients in the terminal.
